name: Santa Fe
tagline: Art Capital of the Southwest with Adobe Charm and High Desert Beauty
description: Santa Fe is unlike any other American city. The oldest state capital in the US blends centuries of Native American, Spanish, and Anglo cultures into a world-renowned art scene, distinctive adobe architecture, and a food culture built around New Mexican chile. At 7,000 feet elevation, summers are cool and winters bring crisp mountain air and skiing. Housing costs are above average for New Mexico but well below coastal cities, making it a compelling FIRE choice for those who value culture and natural beauty over nightlife and big-city bustle.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate to Good – low violent crime
quickFacts.nearestAirport: Santa Fe Regional (SAF) or Albuquerque International Sunport (ABQ, 65 mi)
quickFacts.climate: High desert arid with cool summers and cold winters

housing.description: 1BR apartment or small casita on the south side of town

dining.description: Casual New Mexican spots and taco stands 2-3x/week; cooking at home with Hatch chile

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan through New Mexico exchange

transportation.description: Older paid-off car with insurance and gas; essential for living here

entertainment.description: Free gallery openings on Canyon Road, hiking in the Sangre de Cristos, plaza people-watching

1M.lifestyle: Santa Fe on a tight budget requires discipline, but the payoff is living in one of America's most beautiful and culturally rich small cities. Free Friday gallery walks, stunning hiking, and a dry climate that keeps utility bills low all help. You will feel the squeeze on dining out and housing, but the quality of daily life is hard to beat.

housing.description: Charming 2BR adobe home near the Railyard district or in the historic east side

dining.description: Regular meals at mid-range restaurants like Paloma, Tomasita's, and the Shed

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with dental and vision coverage

transportation.description: Reliable SUV for mountain roads, full coverage insurance

entertainment.description: Santa Fe Opera tickets, ski pass at Ski Santa Fe, art classes, Indian Market weekend

2M.lifestyle: At this level Santa Fe becomes genuinely wonderful. You can rent a beautiful adobe, attend the world-famous opera, ski in winter, and hike in summer. The art scene is endless, the food is extraordinary, and the pace of life is deeply restorative. Weekend trips to Taos or Bandelier add variety.

housing.description: 3BR custom adobe home in the historic east side or foothills with mountain views

dining.description: Top Santa Fe restaurants like Geronimo, Terra, and Sazon regularly; wine dinners

healthcare.description: Premium private health insurance with Christus St. Vincent preferred access

transportation.description: Late-model 4WD SUV, premium insurance, occasional Albuquerque airport shuttle

entertainment.description: Premium opera seats, art collecting, yoga retreats, ski season pass, gallery memberships

3M.lifestyle: This is the ideal Santa Fe experience. A stunning adobe with kiva fireplaces and mountain views, front-row opera seats under the stars, a growing art collection, and the freedom to explore every corner of northern New Mexico. The creative energy of this city is unmatched at any price.

housing.description: Luxury compound on Museum Hill, Las Campanas estate, or historic Canyon Road property

dining.description: Fine dining at Geronimo and Sazon regularly, private chef for entertaining, wine cellar curation

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine, executive wellness programs, alternative healing modalities

transportation.description: Luxury SUV, premium insurance, occasional private car to Albuquerque airport

entertainment.description: Major art collecting, patron-level opera and museum memberships, private ski lessons, cultural travel

domesticHelp.description: Bi-weekly deep cleaning, landscaping, property caretaker for adobe maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Significant art purchases, international travel, spa retreats, philanthropic giving to arts organizations

5M.lifestyle: Santa Fe at this tier is a collector's and aesthete's dream. A museum-quality home filled with art you love, patron-level access to the opera and galleries, and the deep satisfaction of supporting the creative community that makes this city magical. Your home becomes a destination in its own right.

housing.description: Sprawling estate at Las Campanas with golf course and mountain views, or historic compound on Canyon Road

dining.description: Personal chef specializing in New Mexican cuisine, exclusive dining events, catered gallery openings

healthcare.description: Top-tier concierge medicine, executive wellness, naturopathic and holistic care

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, private car service, charter flights from Santa Fe Regional

entertainment.description: Major philanthropic arts patronage, private gallery events, international art fair travel, guest ranch weekends

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, personal assistant, property management team, grounds crew

luxuryExtras.description: Museum-level art acquisitions, first-class international travel, ranch property in Taos, charitable foundations

10M.lifestyle: At this level you become one of Santa Fe's cultural pillars. A world-class private art collection, a stunning compound that hosts artists and dignitaries, philanthropic leadership in the arts community, and the freedom to jet off to Art Basel or Venice Biennale whenever inspiration calls. Santa Fe rewards wealth with meaning, not just comfort.
